---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement to an existing one
title: ""
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the workflow or use case, not
the implementation. "I want to do X, but plaud-tools currently does Y" is a
great shape.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like plaud-tools to do. CLI flags, MCP tool shape, or behavior
changes — be as concrete as helps the discussion.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about (including workarounds you're using
today) and why they're not enough.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, similar features in other tools, or any other
context that helps frame the request.
